node.statement: Polarised holes q_{r,s}=P(r∘s)-r∘s obey, in the state seminorm ||x||_omega^2=omega(x^2), ||q_{r,s}||_omega <= C sqrt(eta)||r||||s|| (4.1) and ||q_{r,s}|| <= C||r||||s||; hence ||P(q_{r,s}∘q_{u,v})|| <= C eta ||r||||s||||u||||v|| (HH) and ||P(q_{r,s}∘z)|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r||||s||||z|| for z in V (HZ).
